summary: ALL REVIEW REQUEST ITEMS PASSED. Backend (pytest 8/8): managers GET/POST/DELETE + 404, reports upsert/update/list/get/404, NEW door_checks dict round-trip, NEW base64 photo round-trip, and POST /api/reports/send returns 200 with {sent:true, pdf_attached:true, recipient:'dm@sphr.com.au'} — Brevo email service is ACTIVATED and a single real email was sent during this run (limited to 1 call total to avoid spamming DM inbox). Frontend (mobile 390x844): full flow verified end-to-end — passwordless login (SG-204 / John Smith / Zachary) -> dashboard -> log patrol entry (Main Gate / Perimeter check OK) -> entry-card-0 appears + 'Synced to management' pill -> tap door-checks-nav -> door-checks-count flips correctly across individual taps (2/18), Check-all (18/18), Reset (0/18), partial (3/18) -> back to dashboard shows '3/18 areas secured' on door card -> Summary screen renders both 'FINAL DOOR CHECKS' (with 18/18 chips after re-check) and 'PATROL LOG' sections -> Submit with incomplete checks opens warning modal exposing review-checks-button + submit-anyway-button -> Review navigates back to door-checks -> Check-all flips to 18/18 -> back to Summary -> Export PDF tap works (no crash). UI Submit-to-DM tap was intentionally skipped to avoid sending a 2nd real Brevo email — equivalent server call was already validated by pytest test_send_report_brevo_email which returned 200 with sent:true and pdf_attached:true. No regressions on prior fixes: photo entries persist, multi-entry list persists across reload.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK; 201 Created would be more conventional (non-blocking, unchanged from prior iterations).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported' on Expo web — cosmetic, expected on web target.
Expo doctor reports version drift: expo@54.0.34 (~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (~6.0.24). Non-blocking; main agent may run `expo install --check`.

action_items: No fix required for the requested features — all items in the review request are working as specified.
Optional: bump Expo SDK patch versions (expo, expo-font, expo-router) to silence doctor warnings.
Optional: return 201 Created from POST /api/managers and POST /api/reports.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/reports/send correctly persists report with submitted=True, builds HTML+PDF, and surfaces 502 on Brevo failure with the upstream code — verified by a recent 502/200 pair in backend logs (503 path also exists when BREVO_API_KEY is empty).

build_report_html escapes user-provided strings via html.escape and renders Final Door Checks with 18-area progress (done/total) — matches DOOR_CHECK_AREAS list shared by frontend (src/lib/doorChecks).

summary.tsx onSubmit() correctly blocks with warnModal when door checks incomplete and only calls performSubmit() when all 18 ticked or user picks Submit Anyway. door_checks dict is forwarded to api.sendReport — verified persisted server-side.
door-checks.tsx persist() saves to AsyncStorage AND triggers syncShift — verified by 'Synced to management' status on Summary after toggles.

All key interactive elements expose testID: door-check-<area>, door-checks-count, check-all-doors, clear-all-checks, door-checks-done, door-checks-nav, summary-nav-button, review-checks-button, submit-anyway-button, submit-report-button, export-pdf-button.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_sphr_api.py — added test_report_with_door_checks_persists and test_send_report_brevo_email (single real Brevo call).
seed_data_creation: One real email sent via /api/reports/send to dm@sphr.com.au from automated regression test (TEST_Automated Regression). Reports collection accumulates TEST_* rows (no DELETE endpoint for reports — acceptable per design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brevo is now ACTIVE — sending a real email costs deliverability quota and reaches dm@sphr.com.au. Limit /api/reports/send calls to 0-1 per run. UI Submit-to-DM in summary.tsx hits this endpoint; either skip clicking it or mock the network. The seed managers list is ['Zachary','Brett','Clarke','Margi','Mel']. Door-check testIDs include the area name verbatim with a single space (e.g. 'door-check-GM Office', 'door-check-Glass Doors x2'). When the manager is selected on the login screen itself, no separate confirm-manager step appears; the app jumps straight to dashboard after start-shift-button.
rca_of_issue: N/A — this was a feature-verification + Brevo activation retest, not a bug fix. All previously fixed bugs (photo entries persisting, multi-entry list, sync not clobbering newer entries) continue to work.
